hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */study.md|*/investigation.md) python3 scripts/update_lineage.py ;; esac; } || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */capability-map/tasks.yaml) python3 capability-map/plot.py ;; esac; } || true
